narrative: An Applied ML Engineer with seven years of experience at Krutrim, a product‑focused firm, brings solid verified skill depth in modern retrieval technologies. Strong alignment comes from hands‑on work with vector stores such as Weaviate and pgvector and with OpenSearch for scalable search pipelines, plus deep‑learning expertise using TensorFlow and LoRA. Broad technical breadth and a stable career trajectory further support the senior AI/ML role. However, limited platform engagement and minor credibility flags lower confidence, and the candidate is based in Coimbatore with an unknown notice period, which may affect immediate availability for a Pune/Noida position.
